value.found_quote: Claude Fable 5 (claude-fable-5) is Anthropic's most capable widely released model. ... Claude Fable 5 is generally available on the Claude API, Claude Platform on AWS, Amazon Bedrock, Vertex AI, and Microsoft Foundry beginning June 9, 2026.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Claude Fable 5 as Anthropic's most capable widely released model, provides its API ID (claude-fable-5), lists pricing, context window, and availability details across multiple cloud platforms. It is described as generally available beginning June 9, 2026, confirming it is an active offering.
